form.formComment: Last start eased back early on 12th of 16 at Bordeaux on March 10 over 1900m, 28 len behind Roi De L'air with 62.5kg at $14. Before that 4th of 9 at Pau All Weather on January 11 over 1600m, 3 len behind Sir Tommy Cen carrying 60kg at $43. Capable of much better performance.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes here off a 42-day let-up. At the latest run favourite; won by 1.5 len at Pau All Weather February 23 over 1600m defeating Wellington Premier carrying 59kg at $4.20. Before that 4th of 9 at Machecoul on February 10 over 1650m, on rain affected going; 2 len behind Ildouce Flechois with 56kg at $5.50. Last-start winner worth including.

form.formComment: Most recently 7th of 11 at Marseille Vivaux on March 9 over 2000m, 7 len behind Grecian Bonanza with 60.5kg at $2.90. The run before that rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd of 8 at Marseille Vivaux on February 16 over 2000m, long-neck behind Grecian Bonanza carrying 57.5kg at $3.40. Can do much better.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months ran last of 13 at La Teste De Buch on March 21 over 1400m, on a slow track; 29 len behind Darius Cen with 56kg at $104. Previously second-up 6th of 10 at Deauville All Weather on November 1 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Everstar carrying 55kg at $14. Prefer in something easier.

form.formComment: Most recently 7th of 9 at Saint-Cloud on March 15 over 1400m, on heavy track; 16 len behind Marcus Aurelius with 56kg at $27. form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 36-day let-up. First-up after four months 3rd of 13 at this track on March 1 over 1600m, 4 len behind Sir Crater carrying 59.5kg at $35. Previously second-up 4th of 11 at Dax on May 19 over 1400m, slow going 2.5 len behind Laith carrying 57kg at $17. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 8th of 13 at Lyon-Parilly on March 15 over 1600m, 8 len behind Riassou with 60kg at $30. form.formComment: Filly back from a spell of ten weeks. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign by head Pau All Weather January 28 over 1600m defeating Goldensim with 54.5kg at $17. Previously first up; third of 11 at Pau All Weather January 13 over 1400m, 2 len behind Breizhy Boy with 54.5kg at $20. Very keen on her prospects while fresh.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months 2nd in a small field at Limoges on March 15 over 1400m, 1.5 len behind Malinovka with 57.5kg. form.formComment: Comes here off a 42-day let-up. Last start came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 15 at Pau All Weather on February 23 over 2000m, 0.6 len behind Goldensim with 60kg at $7.90. Before that 7th of 16 at Pau All Weather on February 8 over 2000m, 1.75 len behind Sharp Rise carrying 54.5kg at $6. Drops significantly in the weights this time and should prove tough to stop.
